en.faqCurrentAnswer: We currently offer four fresh single-origin coffees: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey as our 2026 flagship medium roast, Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed, Guatemalan "La Morena", and Colombian Sugarcane Decaf. We also offer 16 oz bottled cold brew for $5, currently made with the last of our Brazilian Cerrado Natural lot to keep the flavor stable while that coffee lasts. Once the Brazilian runs out, cold brew will transition to our Guatemalan La Morena specialty coffee. Every coffee in the lineup is specialty grade, selected from coffees that cup 80+, and available as whole bean, ground, K-Cups, or bottled cold brew depending on the item.

es.faqCurrentAnswer: Actualmente ofrecemos cuatro cafés frescos de origen único: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey como nuestro tueste medio insignia 2026, Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed, Guatemalan "La Morena" y Colombian Sugarcane Decaf. También ofrecemos cold brew embotellado de 16 oz por $5, actualmente hecho con lo último de nuestro lote brasileño Cerrado Natural para mantener el sabor estable mientras dure ese café. Cuando se termine el brasileño, el cold brew pasará a nuestro café guatemalteco La Morena de especialidad. Toda la línea es de grado de especialidad, seleccionada de cafés que puntúan 80+, y está disponible en grano, molido, K-Cups o cold brew embotellado según el producto.

en.title: Bottled Cold Brew
en.heroAlt: Millionaire's Roast 16 oz bottled cold brew made with Brazilian Cerrado Natural coffee
en.featuredAlt: Millionaire's Roast 16 oz bottled cold brew made with Brazilian Cerrado Natural coffee
en.featuredDescription: Our 16 oz bottled cold brew is currently made with the last of our Brazilian Cerrado Natural lot, held back to keep the cold brew flavor stable for as long as possible. Expect a smooth cup with milk chocolate, almond, dried plum, and vanilla. Once this Brazilian runs out, cold brew will transition to Guatemalan "La Morena".

es.title: Cold Brew embotellado
es.heroAlt: Cold brew embotellado de 16 oz de Millionaire's Roast hecho con café brasileño Cerrado Natural
es.featuredAlt: Cold brew embotellado de 16 oz de Millionaire's Roast hecho con café brasileño Cerrado Natural
es.featuredDescription: Nuestro cold brew embotellado de 16 oz actualmente está hecho con lo último de nuestro lote brasileño Cerrado Natural, reservado para mantener el sabor del cold brew estable el mayor tiempo posible. Espera una taza suave con chocolate con leche, almendra, ciruela seca y vainilla. Cuando se termine este brasileño, el cold brew pasará al guatemalteco "La Morena".

en.heroAlt: Millionaire's Roast Costa Rican Jaguar Honey coffee bag
en.featuredAlt: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey coffee bag from Millionaire's Roast
en.title: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey
en.description: Bright 2026 San Diego Mill honey lot, cup score 85.25, with milk chocolate, honey, and raspberry over a clean medium roast profile.
en.featuredDescription: Our 2026 flagship medium roast is a San Diego Mill honey lot from Tarrazú, cupping at 85.25 with milk chocolate, honey, and raspberry in a bright, clean cup.
en.choice: I want a bright, honey-sweet cup with soft chocolate and raspberry.

es.heroAlt: Bolsa de café Costa Rican Jaguar Honey de Millionaire's Roast
es.featuredAlt: Bolsa de café Costa Rican Jaguar Honey de Millionaire's Roast
es.title: Costa Rican Jaguar Honey
es.description: Lote honey 2026 del beneficio San Diego, puntaje 85.25, con chocolate con leche, miel y frambuesa sobre un perfil limpio de tueste medio.
es.featuredDescription: Nuestro tueste medio insignia 2026 es un lote honey del beneficio San Diego en Tarrazú, con puntaje de taza 85.25 y notas de chocolate con leche, miel y frambuesa en una taza brillante y limpia.
es.choice: Quiero una taza brillante y dulce a miel, con chocolate suave y frambuesa.

en.title: Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed
en.description: Balanced 2026 Chonta washed coffee from Cajamarca, cup score 85.5, with chocolate, green apple, plum, roasted almond, and citrus.
en.featuredDescription: A balanced 2026 washed coffee from Chonta, Cajamarca, cupping at 85.5 with chocolate, green apple, plum, roasted almond, and citrus.
en.choice: I want a balanced cup with chocolate, orchard fruit, and roasted almond.

es.title: Peruvian Chonta G1 Washed
es.description: Café lavado 2026 de Chonta, Cajamarca, puntaje 85.5, con chocolate, manzana verde, ciruela, almendra tostada y cítricos.
es.featuredDescription: Un café lavado 2026 balanceado de Chonta, Cajamarca, con puntaje de taza 85.5 y notas de chocolate, manzana verde, ciruela, almendra tostada y cítricos.
es.choice: Quiero una taza balanceada con chocolate, fruta de huerto y almendra tostada.

en.title: Guatemalan "La Morena"
en.description: Rich 2026 Huehuetenango lot from women producers through La Morena, cup score 85.5, with dark chocolate, caramel, blackberry, and vanilla.
en.featuredDescription: A rich 2026 Huehuetenango lot from various women producers through the La Morena program, cupping at 85.5 with dark chocolate, caramel, blackberry, and vanilla.
en.choice: I want a deeper cup with dark chocolate, caramel, and blackberry.

es.title: Guatemalan "La Morena"
es.description: Lote rico 2026 de Huehuetenango, de mujeres productoras del programa La Morena, puntaje 85.5, con chocolate oscuro, caramelo, mora y vainilla.
es.featuredDescription: Un lote rico 2026 de Huehuetenango, producido por varias mujeres productoras a través del programa La Morena, con puntaje de taza 85.5 y notas de chocolate oscuro, caramelo, mora y vainilla.
es.choice: Quiero una taza más profunda con chocolate oscuro, caramelo y mora.

en.title: Colombian Sugarcane Decaf
en.description: Medium-dark sugarcane EA decaf from Valle del Cauca, cup score 84.5, with milk chocolate, almond, strawberry, vanilla, and citrus.
en.featuredDescription: A bright, full-flavored 2026 sugarcane EA decaf from Valle del Cauca, cupping at 84.5 with milk chocolate, almond, strawberry, vanilla, and citrus.
en.choice: I want real coffee flavor without the caffeine: chocolate, almond, and bright fruit.

es.title: Colombian Sugarcane Decaf
es.description: Descafeinado sugarcane EA de Valle del Cauca, puntaje 84.5, con chocolate con leche, almendra, fresa, vainilla y cítricos.
es.featuredDescription: Un descafeinado sugarcane EA 2026 de Valle del Cauca, brillante y con sabor completo, con puntaje de taza 84.5 y notas de chocolate con leche, almendra, fresa, vainilla y cítricos.
es.choice: Quiero sabor de café real sin cafeína: chocolate, almendra y fruta brillante.
